item.description: ### Fixed - **Approving a plan from your iPhone now actually works.** When Claude Code finishes planning and asks "ready to execute?", tapping Allow on your phone used to do nothing unless you answered within 45 seconds — nearly impossible when you're away from your desk (which is exactly when you get the push). Plan approvals now stay answerable from your phone for **4½ minutes**, and the lock-screen countdown matches the real deadline instead of dimming "too late" early. Ordinary tool approvals are unchanged. If nobody answers remotely, the terminal prompt appears as before.
